m: GT vs RR - TATA IPL 2026 Qualifier 2
d: Witness a blockbuster Qualifier 2 clash as Gujarat Titans take on Rajasthan Royals in a high-pressure battle for the final spot in the IPL 2026 Final. With Sundays title showdown within touching distance, expect tactical battles, momentum-shifting moments, and relentless playoff intensity as Shubman Gills GT face off against Riyan Parags Rajasthan Royals in a winner-takes-all contest. Experience the electrifying atmosphere and live match action on the big screen at PVR INOX.
